title: helmia convolvulacea
intro: Helmia convolvulacea, also known as the Helianthus or False Sunflower, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to various parts of the world. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Helmia convolvulacea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for use in various forms.
